title: Manage implementation of ecological restoration programs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage implementation of ecological restoration programs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Inspect and assess site subject to an ecological restoration program

pcs.text: Interpret ecological restoration project design or plan for purpose of implementation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret ecological restoration project design or plan for purpose of implementation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret ecological restoration project design or plan for purpose of implementation.

pcs.text: Confirm site conditions, level of degradation and restoration potential for site outlined in ecological restoration design or plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm site conditions, level of degradation and restoration potential for site outlined in ecological restoration design or plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm site conditions, level of degradation and restoration potential for site outlined in ecological restoration design or plan.

pcs.text: Assess threats to biotic and abiotic factors of area from ecological restoration works proposed in design or plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess threats to biotic and abiotic factors of area from ecological restoration works proposed in design or plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess threats to biotic and abiotic factors of area from ecological restoration works proposed in design or plan.

pcs.text: Assess range of operating conditions, hazards and environmental conditions that will impact on the implementation of restoration works outlined in design or plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess range of operating conditions, hazards and environmental conditions that will impact on the implementation of restoration works outlined in design or plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess range of operating conditions, hazards and environmental conditions that will impact on the implementation of restoration works outlined in design or plan.

elements.title: Plan implementation of ecological restoration from project plan or design

pcs.text: Confirm ecological restoration approaches and techniques to achieve project design objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm ecological restoration approaches and techniques to achieve project design objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm ecological restoration approaches and techniques to achieve project design objectives.

pcs.text: Develop a proposed program budget in accordance with client expectations and resources

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a proposed program budget in accordance with client expectations and resources.

pcs.text: Prepare an implementation program and schedule according to the ecological restoration design or plan aims and objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare an implementation program and schedule according to the ecological restoration design or plan aims and objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare an implementation program and schedule according to the ecological restoration design or plan aims and objectives.

pcs.text: Confirm program monitoring strategy and measurable key performance indicators for program outputs

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm program monitoring strategy and measurable key performance indicators for program outputs.

pcs.text: Conduct a site-specific risk analysis and develop controls and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a site-specific risk analysis and develop controls and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a site-specific risk analysis and develop controls and procedures.

pcs.text: Determine personnel and skill requirements for implementing program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine personnel and skill requirements for implementing program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine personnel and skill requirements for implementing program.

pcs.text: Identify permits, licenses and authorisations required to complete work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify permits, licenses and authorisations required to complete work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify permits, licenses and authorisations required to complete work.

pcs.text: Identify equipment and materials for restoration work

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify equipment and materials for restoration work.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify transport requirements for equipment and personnel for ecological restoration work.
